name: tauri
description: Tauri 2 development: project setup/migration, tauri.conf & capabilities/security, Rust IPC & plugins, shell UI, debug/test, and distribution/mobile release.

interface.shortDescription: Build, secure, test, and package Tauri 2 apps.
interface.longDescription: A focused marketplace plugin for Tauri 2 development with agent skills. It provides separate skills for scaffolding and migration, tauri.conf and capabilities, Rust IPC and plugins, shell UI features, debug/test workflows, and distribution/mobile release readiness.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Tauri 2 app before release.
Add a secure Tauri command and capability.
